## Summary
- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Type of change
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Internal cleanup
- [ ] test: Testing improvements
- [ ] docs: Documentation only

## Checklist
- [ ] I rebased with latest target branch
- [ ] I ran tests locally (`npm test` and `cd backend && npm test`)
- [ ] I updated documentation and/or `.env.example` when applicable
- [ ] I verified no secrets were committed

## Screenshots (if UI changed)
Attach before/after screenshots here.

## Linked issue
Closes #
